title: Linde (LIN) Inaugurates Hydrogen Refueling System in Germany
text: Linde (LIN) says that the development is signaling its strong initiative in playing a significant role in decarbonizing transport in Europe.

title: Linde Inaugurates World's First Hydrogen Refueling System for Passenger Trains
text: WOKING, UK / ACCESSWIRE / August 24, 2022 / Linde (NYSE: LIN; FWB: LIN) today announced it has inaugurated the world's first hydrogen refueling system for passenger trains in Bremervörde, Germany. Linde's hydrogen refueling system, which it built, owns and operates, will refuel 14 hydrogen-powered passenger trains, enabling each train to run for 1,000 km emission-free on a single refueling.

title: Linde: Light Up The Gas
text: Expanding hydrogen production on the US Gulf Coast will yield twice as much hydrogen. The CHIPS for America Act and FABS Act drive massive expansion in semiconductor manufacturing. Linde will benefit greatly as it supplies industrial gases to reputable customers in this industry.

title: Linde: The UK Chemicals Stock Is Somewhat Expensive After A Big Rally
text: The Materials sector has been a mixed bag recently, but one major Chemicals industry stock surged following its Q2 earnings report. Linde plc features a high valuation and could see some near-term selling pressure based on technicals.
